channel.title: The Mutapa Times
channel.description: Business and intelligence newspaper delivering curated Zimbabwean news from foreign press for the diaspora.
channel.item: Iran reverses decision to open Hormuz citing ‘US piracy under guise of blockade’ https://www.mutapatimes.com/articles/2026-04-18-iran-reverses-decision-to-open-hormuz-citing-us-piracy-under.html Iran has reversed its decision to open the Strait of Hormuz to commercial shipping in response to the continued US blockade of its ports, Fars News Agency reported on 18 April, citing the country’s armed forces headquarters. “Iran agreed in good faith to allow a limit Mon, 27 Apr 2026 21:50:44 +0000 https://www.mutapatimes.com/articles/2026-04-18-iran-reverses-decision-to-open-hormuz-citing-us-piracy-under.html Business Zimbabwe Mail <media:content url="summary: "Iran has reversed its decision to open the Strait of Hormuz to commercial shipping in response to the continued US blockade of its ports, Fars News Agency reported on 18 April, citing the country’s armed forces headquarters. “Iran agreed in good faith to allow a limit" medium="image"/>

channel.title: The Mutapa Times
channel.description: Business and intelligence newspaper delivering curated Zimbabwean news from foreign press for the diaspora.
channel.item: Zimbabwe Split as Public Weighs Electoral Reforms Bill https://www.mutapatimes.com/articles/2026-04-01-zimbabwe-split-as-public-weighs-electoral-reforms-bill.html [DW] Zimbabwe has begun nationwide public hearings on a proposed bill that could extend President Mnangagwa's term and overhaul the electoral system. Supporters call it stabilizing, but critics warn it threatens democracy. Mon, 27 Apr 2026 21:50:44 +0000 https://www.mutapatimes.com/articles/2026-04-01-zimbabwe-split-as-public-weighs-electoral-reforms-bill.html Policy Zimbabwe Independent <media:content url="summary: "[DW] Zimbabwe has begun nationwide public hearings on a proposed bill that could extend President Mnangagwa's term and overhaul the electoral system. Supporters call it stabilizing, but critics warn it threatens democracy." medium="image"/>

channel.item: Enact law to protect national infrastructure, Government told https://www.mutapatimes.com/articles/2026-04-10-enact-law-to-protect-national-infrastructure-government-told.html Source: Enact law to protect national infrastructure, Government told – herald Nyore Madzianike Senior Reporter The Government must urgently consider the enactment of legislation that specifically addresses the protection of critical national infrastructure in all sectors of the Mon, 27 Apr 2026 21:50:44 +0000 https://www.mutapatimes.com/articles/2026-04-10-enact-law-to-protect-national-infrastructure-government-told.html Politics Zimbabwe Situation <media:content url="summary: "Source: Enact law to protect national infrastructure, Government told – herald Nyore Madzianike Senior Reporter The Government must urgently consider the enactment of legislation that specifically addresses the protection of critical national infrastructure in all sectors of the " medium="image"/>
